chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr.Transfer.Appl.No.S- 69 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 04.10.2019. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Additional Prosecutor General. = This is an application moved by UTP Akhtar @ Agha s/o Ali Akbar Panhwar facing trial in Crime No.112/2018 registered at P.S. Phuleli for offence u/s 324, 353, 34 PPC pending trial in the court of VIIth Additional Sessions Judge, Hyderabad, for transfer of the said case on the ground that for last 07 months the Presiding Officer of said court is not available due to which his case is not proceeding. Learned Additional Prosecutor General after going through the application and ground mentioned therein has recorded no objection. Accordingly, this application is allowed. The subject case bearing Crime No.112/2018 registered at P.S. Phuleli for offence u/s 324, 353, 34 PPC pending trial in the court of VIIth Additional Sessions Judge, Hyderabad is withdrawn from the file of that court and transferred to learned Sessions Judge, Hyderabad who either himself proceed with the case or assign the same to some other Additional Sessions Judge for disposal in accordance with law. JUDGE Tufail/PA
